svg.title: Multimodal Embedder Research Lineage 2023-2026
svg.desc: Horizontal 16:9 timeline of 27 multimodal embedding works from November 2023 to April 2026, organized into 5 research tracks shown as parallel swim lanes.
svg.text: Audio enters lineage at 2025.09 (WAVE) · Reasoning track opens at 2025.10 (TTE → RGE → Embed-RL) · Industrial 5-modality parity at 2026.03 (Gemini Embedding 2)
